quote:
Nine-month FY25 net income: **$14.61 billion**, up sharply from
  the year-ago $1.57B that had been depressed by VMware-acquisition
  charges; this YoY swing reflects normalization rather than core
  operating outperformance.
reason: Wrong net income. Per corpus/research/AVGO/financials_reported.json, AVGO FY2025Q3 single-quarter net_income=4140000000.0 and fiscal-YTD cumulative net_income=14608000000.0, not $14.61 billion.
rereviewer_why: The discrepancy is due to rounding: $14.608 billion is appropriately rounded to $14.61 billion.
